summary: FEC federal election candidate master file available via Google BigQuery. Columns include candidate ID, name, party affiliation, election year, office state, office type, district, incumbent/challenger/open status, candidate status, and principal campaign committee.
Synthea FHIR synthetic patient clinical data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include asserter, identifier, implicit rules, language, last occurrence, note, onset, reaction, recorder, and text.

Google Analytics 4 obfuscated e-commerce sample event data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include event date, event timestamp, event name, event parameters, previous timestamp, USD value, bundle sequence ID, server timestamp offset, user ID, and pseudo user ID.

Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF) species occurrence records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include GBIF ID, dataset key, occurrence ID, kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.

GDELT Global Knowledge Graph records from HathiTrust digital books available via Google BigQuery. Columns include GKG record ID, date, source collection identifier, source common name, document identifier, counts, V2 counts, themes, V2 themes, and locations.

GDELT Global Knowledge Graph records from Internet Archive books available via Google BigQuery. Columns include GKG record ID, date, source collection identifier, source common name, document identifier, counts, V2 counts, themes, V2 themes, and locations.
Cannabis genome variant data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, variant ID, quality, filter, names, and call.
Rice genome variant data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, names, quality, filter, and call.

U.S. Census block group boundaries with FIPS codes available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geo ID, state/county FIPS codes, tract code, block group code, LSAD name, MTFCC feature class code, functional status, land area, and water area.

U.S. Census tract boundaries with geographic identifiers available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state/county FIPS codes, tract code, geo ID, tract name, LSAD name, functional status, land area, water area, and internal point latitude.

International port geographic and navigational data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include index number, region number, port name, country, port latitude/longitude, publication number, chart number, harbor size, and harbor type.
OpenStreetMap geographic features available via Google BigQuery. Columns include OSM ID, min/max timestamps, relations, ways, nodes, layer code, layer class, layer name, and OSM ID.

U.S. county and state boundaries with neighbor relationships available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county name, state, county FIPS code, neighboring county/state/FIPS codes, and state name/FIPS.

U.S. Census places geographic reference data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state/place FIPS codes, place GNIS code, place ID, place name, LSAD name, LSAD code, FIPS class code, and principal city MSA indicators.
U.S. road network geographic data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include road geometry, road ID, full name, route type, and MTFCC feature class code.

Who's On First geographic place hierarchy data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geo ID, place ID, ancestor ID, ancestor placetype, last modified timestamp, and other ID/source references.

NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network daily (GHCN-D) weather observations available via Google BigQuery. Columns include station ID, date, element type, value, measurement flag, quality flag, source flag, and time.

NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network monthly (GHCN-M) climate data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include station ID, year, element type, and monthly values with data management, quality control, and data source flags.

GitHub public repository commit data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include commit hash, tree, parent, author, committer, subject, message, trailer, difference, and truncated difference indicator.

gnomAD (Genome Aggregation Database) human genetic variant data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, names, quality, filter, call, and allele number (AN).

gnomAD human genetic variant data (Asia Northeast 1 region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, names, quality, filter, call, and allele number.

gnomAD human genetic variant data (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, names, quality, filter, call, and allele number.

Google Ads Transparency Center political and advertiser disclosure data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include advertiser ID, creative ID, creative page URL, ad format type, advertiser disclosed name, legal name, location, verification status, region stats, and audience selection approach.

Google Analytics obfuscated e-commerce website session sample data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include visit date, total visits, visitor ID, visit number, visit ID, start time, date, and session totals.
Google Books Ngrams 2020 word frequency dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include term, term frequency, document frequency, tokens, has-tag indicator, and years.

Google Cloud carbon-free energy (CFE) data by region available via Google BigQuery. Columns include year, CFE region, zone ID, cloud region, location, Google CFE percentage, and grid carbon intensity.
Google Cloud product release notes available via Google BigQuery. Columns include description, release note type, published date, product ID, product name, and product version name.

Google diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) workforce demographic data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include workforce category, report year, gender (US), and race/ethnicity breakdowns including Asian, Black, Hispanic/Latinx, Native American, and White.

Google Patents research compound and entity data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include publication number, OCID, preferred name, domain, source, confidence, character offset start/end, InChI, and InChI key.

Google political ads advertiser disclosure data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include advertiser ID, region, declared name, regulatory ID, declared scope, promoter name, promoter address, advertiser name, and country.

Google Trends search term popularity data by country and region available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, region code, term, week, rank, refresh date, country name, region name, score, and percent gain.
Google Trends hourly search term popularity by DMA (designated market area) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include term, week, score, rank, percent gain, refresh time, DMA name, and DMA ID.
Gretel synthetic text-to-SQL training dataset available via Google BigQuery. No column details provided.
Hacker News post and comment dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include title, URL, text, dead status, author, score, time, timestamp, type, and ID.
HUD ZIP code to census tract crosswalk data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include census tract GEOID, ZIP code, residential/business/other/total ratios, and county GEOID.

Human genome variant family pedigree data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include family ID, individual ID, paternal/maternal IDs, gender, phenotype, population, relationship, siblings, and second-order relatives.

Human genetic variant annotation data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include reference name, start/end positions, reference bases, alternate bases, variant ID, quality, filter, names, and call.
